core.label: LOLCODE Fundamentals
core.description: Programming language based on lolcat memes.

topics.label: HAI & KTHXBYE
topics.description: Programs start with HAI 1.2 and end with KTHXBYE. Syntax is lolcat speak.

topics.label: Variables (I HAS A)
topics.description: I HAS A var ITZ value. YARN (string), NUMBR (int), NUMBAR (float), TROOF (bool).

topics.label: I/O (VISIBLE, GIMMEH)
topics.description: VISIBLE for output, GIMMEH for input. Output is newline-terminated.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: O RLY? (if), WTF? (switch), IM IN YR LOOP (loops). YA RLY / NO WAI / OIC.

topics.label: Operators
topics.description: SUM OF, DIFF OF, PRODUKT OF, QUOSHUNT OF. Boolean: BOTH OF, EITHER OF, NOT.
